text.tspan: CHAOS ENGINEERING: deliberately inject failures into a running system
to BUILD CONFIDENCE that it survives real failures.
1. Build a HYPOTHESIS about steady state behavior
3. Run experiments in PRODUCTION (the only way to learn the truth)
Netflix coined 'chaos engineering' u2014 these principles defined the field.
did the system stay within hypothesis? u2192 confidence up
did it not? u2192 you found a weakness
either way: SHARE FINDINGS, FIX WEAKNESSES, RE-RUN
